api.name: Link
api.description: Styled anchor with underline + color variants.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: The URL the link navigates to. Omitted from the rendered <a> entirely (no href attribute) when null, empty, or whitespace-only, so the link stays inert instead of navigating to the current page.

parameters.name: External
parameters.description: Opens the link in a new tab (target="_blank"), automatically adding rel="noopener noreferrer" unless the caller already supplied rel.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Renders the link as non-interactive: no href, aria-disabled="true", tabindex="-1" (removed from the tab order) and pointer events disabled.

parameters.name: AriaCurrent
parameters.description: Value for the aria-current attribute when this link represents the current item (e.g. "page" for the active nav link). Null omits it.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style: "default" (primary color, underline on hover), "muted" (muted color, foreground on hover), or "underline" (always underlined).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Text size utility suffix (e.g. "sm" renders text-sm). Omitted when null, leaving the inherited font size.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <a> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the <a> element.

mdSummary:
# Link

Styled anchor with underline + color variants.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Typography
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/link

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Link | Href | `string?` | `` | The URL the link navigates to. Omitted from the rendered <a> entirely (no href attribute) when null, empty, or whitespace-only, so the link stays inert instead of navigating to the current page. |
| Link | External | `bool` | `` | Opens the link in a new tab (target="_blank"), automatically adding rel="noopener noreferrer" unless the caller already supplied rel. |
| Link | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Renders the link as non-interactive: no href, aria-disabled="true", tabindex="-1" (removed from the tab order) and pointer events disabled. |
| Link | AriaCurrent | `string?` | `` | Value for the aria-current attribute when this link represents the current item (e.g. "page" for the active nav link). Null omits it. |
| Link | Variant | `string` | `"default"` | Visual style: "default" (primary color, underline on hover), "muted" (muted color, foreground on hover), or "underline" (always underlined). |
| Link | Size | `string?` | `` | Text size utility suffix (e.g. "sm" renders text-sm). Omitted when null, leaving the inherited font size. |
| Link | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The link's visible content. |
| Link | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the <a> element. |
| Link | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the <a> element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Link) — The link's visible content.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Link />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`

## Files
- `UI/Link/Link.razor`
